missingLetters.title: Missing Letters Rules
missingLetters.rule1Point1: Identify and fill in the missing letters to complete the word
missingLetters.rule4Point1: Read the clues carefully to help identify the correct word

jumbledLetters.title: Jumbled Letters Rules
jumbledLetters.rule1Point1: Letters are mixed up - tap them in the correct order to form the word
jumbledLetters.rule2Point1: Tap the hint button to see an image clue if you need help
jumbledLetters.rule4Point1: Fill all boxes with correct letters to win and move to the next level

perfectMatch.title: Perfect Match Rules
perfectMatch.rule1Point1: Tap letters in the exact sequence to match the hidden word
perfectMatch.rule2Point1: Each letter must match the correct position - wrong letters won't be accepted
perfectMatch.rule4Point1: Use undo, restart, or hint buttons if needed - complete before time runs out

memoryGame.title: Memory Game Rules
memoryGame.rule1Point1: Flip cards to reveal and find matching pairs
memoryGame.rule2Point1: Complete the grid within the time limit
memoryGame.rule3Point1: Keep track of card positions to make matches

memoryGame.matchPair: Match the relevant pair from the grid and keep learning as you play everyday.

errors.selectGrid: Please select a grid type first!

pilot.completeTasks: Complete tasks to earn rewards and progress through your journey.

1.title: AI FlashLearn
1.desc: Watch a 1-minute video and answer a question right to earn 120 Skill Points.

2.title: AI RapidFire Quest
2.desc: Complete your daily AI quest to earn 350 SP.

3.title: AI Word Forge
3.desc: Build AI Words at the Speed of Thought and earn 160 SP.

4.title: AI Term Scramble
4.desc: Reconstruct AI terms from scrambled letters and earn 160 SP.

5.title: AI Concept Match
5.desc: Match AI terms, symbols, or concepts and earn 200 SP.

7.title: AI Insight Vault
7.desc: Enhance your AI knowledge with facts and insights, earning 180 SP.

8.title: AI Symbol Decode
8.desc: Solve the emoji puzzle and earn 240 Skill Points (120 for each Word)

9.title: AI StoryLens
9.desc: Read the quick 1-minute blog to understand the concept and earn 220 SP.

10.title: AI Tool Missions
10.desc: Follow the instruction given and use the AI tool to earn 500 Skill Points.

11.title: AI Myth Breaker
11.desc: Challenge false Beliefs and earn 150 SP.

12.title: AI Failure Files
12.desc: Learn AI by Understanding Where It Went Wrong and earn 280 SP.

13.title: AI Tool Arena
13.desc: Choose the Right Tool. Win the Battle. Earn 400 SP.
